entries.description: Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md, recent change-logs
Wrote session-state.json marking session 1 in-progress (currentSession=1, totalSessions=3)
Added synthesize_not_started_state(), atomic write-then-rename, _read_total_sessions_from_spec helper to ai-router/session_state.py
Added backfill_session_state_files() with change-log/activity-log/none branch inference; preserves existing files untouched
Added ai-router/backfill_session_state.py with --base-dir and --dry-run flags, follows existing close_session/dump_session_state_schema CLI pattern
Added 17 tests in ai-router/tests/test_session_state_backfill.py covering synthesizer idempotency, backfill branches, dry-run, non-recursive walk, missing base-dir, CLI smoke
Full ai-router test suite passes: 623 tests, no regressions
Ran backfill on this repo: synthesized session-state.json for sets 007/008/009 (sets 001-006 already had files and were preserved)
Cross-provider verification round 1 via gpt-5-4: ISSUES FOUND (return-type contract mismatch, missing test for state-file-only branch, atomic-write race on fixed temp filename)

Addressed all three round-1 findings: return type changed to int per spec (paths exposed via _planned_backfill_paths internal helper); added test_existing_state_file_only_is_preserved; _atomic_write_json switched to tempfile.mkstemp for unique temp filenames with cleanup-on-error
Cross-provider verification round 2 via gpt-5-4: VERIFIED (all three fixes confirmed; two non-blocking notes about no external callers and an inherent plan/write split in the CLI)
Full ai-router test suite passes: 627 tests (623 baseline + 4 added during fix-issues)
Registered session 2 start; session-state.json flipped to in-progress with current orchestrator metadata

Skipped Step 3.5 (ai-assignment.md authoring via route()) per orchestrator-instruction memory restricting ai-router usage to end-of-session verification. No prior session set has authored ai-assignment.md; this matches current repo practice.

Added read_status() helper in session_state.py with lazy-synth fallback (file-absent), parse-error propagation per spec risk section, and tolerant canonicalization for pre-Set-7 drift (completed->complete, done->complete) via _STATUS_ALIASES map.

Collapsed find_active_session_set (session_log.py) and print_session_set_status (__init__.py) to use read_status. Did NOT modify reconciler: its sweep already uses current_lifecycle_state(events), the authoritative source per the existing codebase comment; a coarse read_status pre-filter would either duplicate the events check or mask drift the reconciler exists to surface.

Created tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/sessionState.ts with readStatus + synthesizeNotStartedState mirroring Python writers. Uses fs.renameSync atomic write with PID+random temp suffix matching _atomic_write_json.

Collapsed readSessionSets (utils/fileSystem.ts) state detection to readStatus. Updated fileSystem.test.ts fixtures to write canonical session-state.json + added regression test for completed alias canonicalization.

Added ai-router/tests/test_read_status.py with 15 tests: 4 canonical pass-through (parametrized), completed/done alias canonicalization, unknown-passes-through, lazy-synth side effect, lazy-synth idempotency on drifted file (no rewrite), 3 error-propagation (JSONDecodeError / ValueError on non-dict / ValueError on missing status), find_active_session_set integration (status overrides activity-log presence; lazy-synth from spec.md-only folder).
ai-router suite: 642 passed (627 baseline + 15 new). TypeScript: tsc --noEmit clean, esbuild compile clean, eslint clean.

Cross-provider verification round 1 via gpt-5-4 (260s, $0.2538). Verdict: ISSUES_FOUND. Findings: (1) read_status absent-branch contract hole — re-read after lazy-synth bypasses canonicalize/validate (fix: extract _load_status); (2) current_lifecycle_state and close-out gate idempotency collapses not shown (need investigation — these readers consult events, not coarse status); (3) reconciler exemption is acceptable per code judgment but should be documented; (4) test gaps: print_session_set_status, contradictory-fixture readSessionSets, TS/Py parity. Aliases placement (read boundary) confirmed correct.

Addressed round-1 findings: (1) extracted _load_canonical_status (Py) / loadCanonicalStatus (TS) shared by both branches of read_status/readStatus to close the post-synthesis-validation gap; (2) documented no-op-collapse rationale in close_session.py _is_already_closed and session_events.py current_lifecycle_state (both events-driven, nothing to remove); (3) added 5 new tests: 2 race-injection tests for the lazy-synth re-read path, print_session_set_status contradictory-fixture test (3 fixtures), 2 TS contradictory-fixture tests (status overrides activity-log/change-log presence).

Round 2 via gpt-5-4 (168s, $0.2051). Verdict: 2 issues found. (R2-1) lazy-synth fallback misclassifies legacy folders — write was always not-started, should infer from change-log/activity-log presence; (R2-2) close_session.py and session_events.py docstring changes weren't in the bundle, so couldn't verify.

Fixed R2-1: introduced ensure_session_state_file (Py) / ensureSessionStateFile (TS) that uses _backfill_payload / backfillPayload inference (change-log -> complete, activity-log -> in-progress, neither -> not-started). read_status now routes file-absent through ensure_*, not synthesize_not_started_state. Added 4 new tests (2 Py + 2 TS) locking in legacy-folder lazy-synth classification. Synthesize_not_started_state stays as the explicit "truly not started" entry point used by register_session_start. R2-2 fixed by including close_session.py and session_events.py diffs in the round-3 bundle.

Round 3 via gpt-5-4 (114s, $0.1482). Verdict: VERIFIED. R2-1 functionally addressed; R2-2 docstrings present and correct; no regression on the genuine not-started path; no close-out blocker. One non-blocking docstring note: read_status / readStatus prose still mentioned synthesize_not_started_state.

Updated read_status docstring (Py) and readStatus JSDoc (TS) to reference ensure_session_state_file / ensureSessionStateFile and describe the actual inference rules (change-log -> complete, activity-log -> in-progress, neither -> not-started). Cosmetic only.
Final ai-router suite: 647 passed (627 baseline + 20 new in test_read_status.py). TypeScript: tsc clean, esbuild compile clean, eslint clean (only pre-existing warning).
